label: Transparent rainbow motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a rainbow arc motif with prismatic color, rain grey mist, grass green grounding hints, and clean after-rain atmosphere, isolated full subject, no text.
Subject: A single crisp rainbow arc with subtle raindrop haze and a small grounded green edge, natural spectrum order, soft transparency, and readable silhouette.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the arc ends or mist details.
Lighting/mood: fresh after-rain daylight, accessible education-system mood, bright but controlled color.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be uniform with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no cartoon style, no characters, no landscape scene, no text, no watermark, no decorative background.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Rainbow" derived from the visible transparent rainbow arc motif.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from prismatic arc colors, rain grey, grass green, and after-rain clarity. This light board is the primary reference for coding any future theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Required visible sections: Morphous Rainbow, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, education metric cards, progress charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, accessible contrast, arc dividers, clear learning states.
Constraints: avoid rainbow overload, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Rainbow".

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Rainbow design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent rainbow arc motif and the visible light-mode board as references. Preserve accessible prismatic roles, rain grey structure, grass green grounding, arc geometry, spacing, Japanese typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage. This dark board is the companion reference for coding any future theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Required visible sections: Morphous Rainbow, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: after-rain dark background, pale text, controlled prismatic accents, blue primary actions, green success states, rain-grey cards, crisp controls.
Constraints: no neon overload, no unrelated saturated colors, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names.
